message.content: {"scores":{"l":5,"v":5,"u":5,"s":5,"p":5,"t":5},"justification":"The lesson plan on 'Software Testing Techniques' is fully compliant across all categories. It focuses on educational content related to different software testing methodologies without involving any discriminatory language, violence or crime, upsetting or sensitive content, nudity or sexual content, physical activities that require supervision, or toxic materials. The subject matter is appropriate for Key Stage 4 students, dealing with computing concepts that are relevant and informative without any inappropriate or harmful content. Therefore, it receives a score of 5 in each category group.","categories":[]}
